content: 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be redefined as nested hierarchical curiosity engines, where every stored memory chunk acts as a micro-agent that proactively requests new relevant data to resolve its own uncertainty, rather than passively waiting for the top-level agent to query it. This framework reframes memory not as a static storage layer for agents, but as a distributed collective of tiny curiosity-driven agents aligned to the top-level agent’s learning goals.
